commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=e3bb7eae11f3177d27192c1422b2329bbd53fa85)
commands.review_summary:
The PR updates the Arabic Control UI locale bundle and Arabic translation memory for skills labels, quick settings, chat controls, and cron empty states.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review finding: source inspection shows the PR changes generated `Skills` locale output while both the generator default glossary and Arabic glossary still require `Skills -> Skills`. I did not run UI checks because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: This needs contributor-provided readable real UI proof plus a maintainer terminology decision for `Skills`, so it is not a safe automated repair candidate.

target.title: fix(ui): improve Arabic Control UI translations
target.body:
## Summary
- Improve Arabic Control UI translations for skills, browser/tool profile labels, chat controls, and cron empty states.
- Keep the Arabic translation memory file in sync with the locale bundle.

## Real behavior proof
- **Behavior or issue addressed:** Arabic Control UI strings now render in Arabic for the updated locale bundle instead of showing English fallbacks in the interface.
- **Real environment tested:** Windows 11, local OpenClaw Control UI dev server from this PR branch with Vite at `http://127.0.0.1:5174/`, opened in Microsoft Edge through Playwright.
- **Exact steps or command run after the patch:** Started the UI with `pnpm --dir ui exec vite --host 127.0.0.1 --port 5174`, opened the page in a real browser, set `openclaw.i18n.locale` to `ar`, reloaded the page, and read the rendered page text.
- **Evidence after fix:** Copied live output from the real browser page after reload:

```text
OpenClaw
???? ??????? Gateway
????? URL ?? WebSocket
??? Gateway
???? ?????? (??? ?????)
?????
???????? ??????
???? ?????? ??? Gateway? ???? ????? ??? ??? ???? ?? ???? ???? ?????? ??? ?? ????? ??? ??????? ?? ???????.
???? ????? ?????? ?? openclaw dashboard --no-open ?? ???? ???? ?????? ???????.
??? ?? ??? ????? ??? ????? ???? openclaw doctor --generate-gateway-token ??? ???? Gateway.
???? ??? ????? ??? ???? ??? ????? ?????? ????????.
????? ?????
????? ?????? Control UI
????? ???????
???? Gateway ??? ????? ??????:
openclaw gateway run
???? ??? ????? URL ????? ????????? ???? ????:
openclaw dashboard
???? ????? URL ?? WebSocket ?????? ?????? ?? ???? ????? URL ?????? ???? ???????.
???? ????????? ?
```

- **Observed result after fix:** The live Control UI rendered Arabic login/connection copy, including `???? ??????? Gateway`, `???? ?????? (??? ?????)`, `?????`, and the updated auth guidance strings.
- **What was not tested:** None

## Validation
- `pnpm install --frozen-lockfile`
- `pnpm ui:i18n:check`
- `pnpm ui:build`
- `pnpm lint:ui:no-raw-window-open`
- `pnpm build`
- `pnpm exec vitest run --config test/vitest/vitest.ui.config.ts ui/src/i18n/test/translate.test.ts --reporter=verbose`

Local note: `pnpm test:ui` did not fully complete in this WSL environment because Playwright browser tests need the missing system library `libnspr4.so`; the targeted i18n test passed with the repository Vitest config. A Windows browser proof was run separately above.
target.author: aim9sour
